basic_details.job_title: ICAR-IARI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Young Professional and Field Assistant Posts
basic_details.short_information: ICAR-Indian Agricultural Research Institute (ICAR-IARI) Young Professional II and Field Assistant Notification 2026 has been released on the official website www.iari.res.in. A total of 3 vacancies have been announced through the ICAR-IARI Young Professional II and Field Assistant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years for all posts. Age relaxation: five years for SC/ST & women and three years for OBC.

qualification.education_qualification: First class Master’s degree in Environmental Sciences\/ Soil Science & Agricultural Chemistry\/ Ag Chemistry (with thesis work), 10th pass with experience of working in agricultural fields, data entry in MS excel
qualification.details: Young Professional 2: First class Master’s degree with specialization in Environmental Sciences/ Soil Science & Agricultural Chemistry/ Ag Chemistry (with thesis work). Desirable: Experience in sampling and analysis of soil and air samples, handling of instruments like GC, GC-MS, spectrophotometer, scientific literature review, good scientific writing skills and data curation and analysis in MS Excel. Field assistant: 10th pass with experience of working in agricultural fields, data entry in MS excel. Desirable: Experience in soil and GHG sampling, soil sample processing, GHG data entry. Field assistant: 10th pass with experience of working in agricultural fields, data entry in MS excel. Desirable: Experience in soil sample collection, soil sample processing.

salary_details.details: Young Professional 2: Rs. 42,000/- per month (fixed) Field assistant: Rs. 22,000/- per month (fixed) Field assistant: Rs. 20,191/- per month (fixed)

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ICAR-IARI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the ICAR-IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the ICAR-IARI Young Professional 2 and Field Assistant posts is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Young Professional 2 post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Young Professional 2 position at ICAR-IARI.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Field Assistant post?
faq.answer: For the Field Assistant post, candidates need to have passed the 10th standard with relevant experience in agricultural fields and data entry in MS Excel.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the ICAR-IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts is 35 years, with age relaxations applicable for SC/ST, women, and OBC categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Young Professional 2 position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Young Professional 2 post will receive a fixed salary of Rs. 42,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process for the ICAR-IARI recruitment will be based on an Online Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How should candidates apply for the ICAR-IARI recruitment?
faq.answer: Eligible candidates are required to apply by sending their complete application via email before the last date.

faq.question: Q9. What is the tentative date for the online interview?
faq.answer: The tentative date for the online interview is 08th July 2026.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
